title: Archive: VLM Aesthetic Evaluation
description: Archive reason: recent aesthetic-evaluation benchmarks cover the generic VLM-as-aesthetic-judge topic, and it does not connect to the current robot data loop.
summary: VLM aesthetic evaluation is archived as a non-core evaluation direction. It can inform presentation or generated-asset quality checks, but it should not occupy Survey space until it is tied to robot assets or CAD acceptance.

details.text: AesEval-Bench and Visual Aesthetic Benchmark already frame systematic VLM/MLLM aesthetic judgment. That completes the generic topic more directly than our dashboard needs.

details: Moved-out live work: if Robotics + 3D Printing reopens, use aesthetic checks as a secondary product-quality metric, not a standalone Survey project.
Archive decision: no open TODO until tied to a specific product/CAD/demo acceptance gate.
risks_decisions: Reason type: externally covered and not currently connected to embodied data/model/robot execution.
Reopen condition: generated robot assets or PoD products need a measurable aesthetic/utility scoring pipeline.
